overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a foggy bayou swamp at night toward a solitary wooden cabin with warm interior lighting. The scene features Spanish moss-draped oak trees, muddy ground, and atmospheric horror-game aesthetics with volumetric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy swamp trail with distant cabin view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy path toward the distant cabin light, navigating through the foggy swamp

entered.detail: massive oak tree with hanging Spanish moss silhouetted against the foggy moonlight
rustic wooden cabin with warm glowing windows visible through the fog
wet muddy path reflecting the dim moonlight
simple wooden fence lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy swamp trail at night, with a massive oak tree draped in Spanish moss dominating the right side. The camera moves forward along the muddy path toward a distant wooden cabin with warm light glowing from its windows, passing a simple wooden fence.

events.description: cabin porch light becomes more prominent, casting warm orange glow on the surrounding fog

agents.ego_description: continuing the approach as the cabin grows larger and more detailed, passing the large oak tree

entered.detail: brick chimney visible on the cabin roof against the night sky
covered front porch with wooden railing becoming visible

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves closer, the large oak tree and fence pass behind, revealing more of the cabin's structure including its brick chimney and covered porch. The artificial light from the cabin windows becomes the primary light source, cutting through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden cabin porch with rocking chair

events.description: ascends the wooden steps from the muddy trail onto the covered porch
moves into the warm artificial light of the porch, interior cabin light visible through windows

agents.ego_description: ascending the porch steps and approaching the cabin door, moving from outdoor swamp to sheltered porch

entered.detail: wooden steps leading up to the porch platform
wooden rocking chair sitting on the porch
front door with warm yellow light glowing from within the cabin
wooden porch railing with vertical slats

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the cabin, ascends the wooden steps onto the porch, and moves toward the door. A rocking chair sits to the left as the scene transitions from the foggy exterior to the warm, artificially lit porch area, with the cabin's interior light visible through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, foggy swamp that culminates in the arrival at a warmly lit wooden cabin. It begins on a muddy trail dominated by a massive oak tree draped in Spanish moss, moving past a simple wooden fence toward a distant glow. As the camera advances, the tree and fence recede into the mist, revealing the cabin's brick chimney and covered porch as the artificial light from the windows begins to pierce through the fog. The scene then shifts from the damp exterior to the immediate vicinity of the house, ascending the wooden steps and passing a rocking chair before finally coming to a halt at the door under the warm radiance of the porch.
